subject: refactor(docs): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props canonical conventions
body:
Cross-repo audit revealed model-pear's CLAUDE.md had drifted from the
glow-props canonical version. Aligned shared convention sections:
- Added Process section and REMINDER banners after key sections
- Added Principles #6 (Follow conventions) and #7 (Repeatable process)
- Aligned Cleanup (// KEEP: marker), Quality Checks (specific items)
- Added comprehensive Documentation section with per-doc descriptions
- Added Triggers section (10 analysis triggers with sweep behavior)
- Added 3 missing Prohibitions from glow-props
- Expanded AI Notes (commit before ending, sibling repos, comms style)
- Removed standalone COMMUNICATION STYLE section (merged into AI Notes)

Tags: docs, claude-md, alignment, conventions
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch
